conceptClusters.title: Retrieved document navigation structure recovery table and regression invariants
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves complete-document, link and fragment, article and section, multi-error recovery, every-cell table-context, and changed-case invariants without copied source or prompts.
Learner integrates the prior invariants into one unfamiliar multi-page task rather than treating them as independent checklist items.

conceptClusters.title: Independent stakeholder service selection integration revision and defense
exitEvidence: Learner interprets an unfamiliar stakeholder brief, identifies users and complete tasks, resolves ambiguity, scopes privacy and failure boundaries, plans original information architecture, builds from empty files, and selects the simplest truthful HTML mechanisms without a near-copy starter.

Learner tests complete processes across content, behavior, accessibility, validation, resources, failure, input, keyboard, zoom, responsive variation, persistence, and changed cases; repairs evidence-backed causes; and defends decisions, tradeoffs, evidence limits, unresolved risks, and next work without claiming publication or conformance.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked decision and evidence map shows how an unfamiliar stakeholder brief becomes an original complete HTML service, changed-case evaluation, revision, and bounded defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: A new brief, constraints, open questions, user tasks, empty-file boundary, evidence menu, competing structures, and incomplete project traces are provided without solution source.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner predicts and explains all seven prerequisite and transfer concepts before guided independent work.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts the committed decision with one observable brief, artifact, task, or evidence fact without revealing the target solution.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance exposes one decision boundary at a time: task, information, structure, behavior, evidence, revision, then defense.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a revised decision and a parallel changed brief before continuing.

interactions.title: Predict complete service documents and navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict page boundaries, complete document envelopes, titles, languages, shared navigation, truthful links, destination URLs, fragments, target identity, visibility, focus, and continuation for an unfamiliar multi-page service.

evidence.observable: Every page is independently complete and every navigation task reaches exact current destination with usable fragment continuation.
evidence.changedCase: One service section becomes a separate page and a heading title changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One long page or repeated boilerplate is always safest.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive pages and destinations from user tasks and content ownership.

interactions.title: Predict content relationships and data tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Predict independent articles versus thematic sections, heading hierarchy, form purpose and recovery, genuine table purpose, exact every-cell header context, and complete stakeholder tasks for changed content.
interactions.artifactChange: Structure and data-task predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Content grouping, collection, correction, submission, and comparison relationships remain meaningful without visual or checklist substitution.
evidence.changedCase: Reusable updates become independent articles while the request form and comparison axes change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Required elements can be distributed anywhere to satisfy the brief.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map content and data relationships to actual tasks.

interactions.title: Inspect invariant-driven acceptance evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect how changed text, language, order, quantity, resources, IDs, relationships, input, state, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, retry, reset, and recovery cases protect a complete service.
interactions.artifactChange: Transfer acceptance evidence map is saved.

evidence.observable: Every test names a stakeholder task, invariant, expected observation, near-miss, failure meaning, repair boundary, and evidence limit.
evidence.changedCase: The passing prototype receives new content, relationships, failures, and responsive states.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rubric element presence and screenshots prove service behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive acceptance from task invariants and failure consequences.

interactions.title: Explain independent transfer standard
interactions.learnerAction: Explain brief interpretation, assumptions, questions, task and privacy scope, information architecture, mechanism selection, empty-file authorship, evidence plan, revisions, tradeoffs, limits, unresolved risks, and defensible completion boundary.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent transfer model becomes checkpoint evidence.

evidence.observable: Every decision connects stakeholder need to original artifact behavior, changed evidence, rejected alternatives, and bounded conclusion without near-copy transfer.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder priority, content volume, privacy constraint, and failure environment all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Finishing a familiar template or checklist proves independent transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild from unfamiliar task and justify each selected mechanism.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A fictional credential-free mutual-aid service portal is planned, built from empty files, tested as complete processes, revised, and defended with original evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A stakeholder brief, content inventory, privacy limits, complete tasks, ambiguous decisions, and empty project directory are provided without source, design, or solution.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner independently selects and integrates prior HTML mechanisms under guided decision and evidence prompts.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names observed evidence, unmet competency, stakeholder consequence, and smallest next decision without giving finished code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints narrow task or evidence boundaries but never provide a page skeleton, required tag list, or solution ordering.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failed evidence routes to a smaller parallel mutual-aid decision and a fresh changed retest.

interactions.title: Interrogate the mutual-aid brief
interactions.learnerAction: Identify intended users, find/request/offer/compare/contact tasks, content ownership, unknowns, contradictions, privacy and safety limits, failure boundaries, pages, evidence needs, and questions before choosing markup.
interactions.artifactChange: Mutual-aid brief decision log is committed.

evidence.observable: Every assumption is labeled, high-impact ambiguity becomes a question or bounded decision, and acceptance evidence follows complete tasks.
evidence.changedCase: A public contact field becomes private and one task moves from information to data collection.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Start coding the obvious structure and clarify later.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate stated need, inference, risk, question, and acceptance evidence.

interactions.title: Build complete portal pages and destinations
interactions.learnerAction: Create empty-source complete documents with truthful unique titles and language, shared meaningful navigation, resolved relative URLs, purpose-clear links, stable fragments, visible targets, focus handling, and keyboard continuation.
interactions.artifactChange: Portal document and navigation foundation is committed.

evidence.observable: Every direct, relative, query, fragment, back-forward, copied, keyboard, and failed-resource navigation task reaches correct context across pages.
evidence.changedCase: Project moves directory, one page splits, labels lengthen, and target headings reorder.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Working clicks in current directory prove portable navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace document and URL consumers from saved source.

interactions.title: Structure mutual-aid information
interactions.learnerAction: Turn the content inventory into heading hierarchy, landmarks, navigation lists, prose, independent updates, thematic sections, contact ownership, figures, media alternatives, disclosures, and source order based on meaning and tasks.
interactions.artifactChange: Portal semantic information architecture is committed.

evidence.observable: Each article, section, heading, region, disclosure, and source-order decision follows content relationship and survives linear reading and changed content.
evidence.changedCase: One update becomes reusable, a section loses its heading, and service categories double.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual card layout determines article and section elements.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify content independence, theme, hierarchy, and task role.

interactions.title: Build request recovery and privacy boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Collect only necessary fictional request data with visible labels, group context, input purpose, inclusive validation, specific persistent errors, retained valid values, summary and focus strategy, correction, confirmation, one request, and no duplicate side effect.
interactions.artifactChange: Portal request and recovery journey is committed.

evidence.observable: Every diverse valid and invalid complete task preserves privacy boundary, exact entries, correction, authoritative response, and one side effect.
evidence.changedCase: A required field becomes optional, server adds two errors, and retry follows interruption.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More fields, native validation, and success alert prove service intake.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace minimized purpose through entry list, recovery, request, and effect.

interactions.title: Build resource comparison context
interactions.learnerAction: Choose a table only for genuine two-dimensional resource availability; build caption, groups, necessary spans, simple or explicit headers, full cell context, copy, linearization, zoom, and bounded local scrolling.

evidence.observable: Every changed value retains exact row, column, group, and explicit context through table navigation and narrow use.
evidence.changedCase: Resource types regroup, locations become columns, IDs change, and long status text is added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Grid appearance or required table element justifies markup.
interactions.correctionRoute: Start from intersecting data relationships and every-cell tasks.

interactions.title: Run complete portal changed cases
interactions.learnerAction: Test all pages and complete tasks under changed text, language, direction, quantity, order, resources, IDs, relationships, input, state, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, retry, reset, and recovery.

evidence.observable: Every mutation protects a named stakeholder invariant, fails a near-miss, preserves objective, and reports exact first divergence and repair boundary.
evidence.changedCase: All content, relationship, resource, state, input, and responsive dimensions change together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Happy-path demo and screenshots prove project quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Exercise complete behavior and failure processes from named invariants.

interactions.title: Inspect portal evidence and revise
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect validation, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, navigation, form, table, keyboard, zoom, responsive, failure, and observed-task evidence; rank causes, revise minimally, and rerun affected complete processes.

evidence.observable: Each revision traces stakeholder consequence to first divergent evidence, root cause, rejected patch, minimal repair, regression, limit, and remaining risk.
evidence.changedCase: A clean validator run accompanies a failed keyboard task and privacy overcollection finding.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rubric completion or tool score ranks revisions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prioritize causal impact, risk, reach, and evidence confidence.

interactions.title: Defend mutual-aid transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain brief interpretation, original information architecture, element and relationship choices, data minimization, alternatives, complete tasks, failures, changed cases, revisions, evidence limits, unresolved risks, ownership, and next work.

evidence.observable: Every claim is original, task-linked, behavior-proven, changed-tested, privacy-aware, evidence-bounded, and free of accessible, compliant, complete, or published overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder priority, target audience, content ownership, and one critical task change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Walkthrough of tags and passing checks constitutes defense.
interactions.correctionRoute: Connect each decision to stakeholder task, evidence, alternatives, and limits.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A public-health information variation transfers independent selection, integration, changed testing, revision, and defense with fewer prompts and unrelated requirements.
activityDesigns.startingState: A new public-health brief, content inventory, privacy boundary, complete tasks, and empty directory are provided without structure or source.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner completes all seven concepts with faded support and no copied mutual-aid architecture.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only the first divergent task evidence and competency after submission.
activityDesigns.hintContract: One optional cue names a decision or evidence layer, never markup or page order.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss returns one smaller parallel public-health decision before retry.

interactions.title: Complete public-health brief decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Complete users, tasks, pages, content ownership, source authority, unknowns, privacy, safety, failures, acceptance evidence, scope, and original architecture decisions before coding.

evidence.observable: Every assumption is labeled and each high-impact task or risk has a question, bounded decision, and falsifiable acceptance evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Audience, content authority, emergency status, and data-collection need change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Reuse the prior portal architecture with renamed content.
interactions.correctionRoute: Re-derive decisions from this brief and its constraints.

interactions.title: Build original public-health service
interactions.learnerAction: Build complete pages, truthful navigation and fragments, semantic articles and sections, minimized appointment-interest recovery, and genuine clinic-hours table context from empty files without a provided skeleton.
interactions.artifactChange: Original public-health HTML service is committed.

evidence.observable: Complete information, navigation, collection, correction, comparison, keyboard, zoom, and responsive tasks work across every page.
evidence.changedCase: One page splits, articles become sections, form purpose narrows, and table axes change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Including every prior feature proves integration.
interactions.correctionRoute: Select only mechanisms required by actual tasks and relationships.

interactions.title: Test public-health complete processes
interactions.learnerAction: Run validation, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, navigation, form, table, keyboard, zoom, responsive, privacy, resource-failure, persistence, retry, and changed-case tests from named task invariants.

evidence.observable: Every complete process survives realistic content, relationship, input, state, failure, and environment mutations or records an actionable first divergence.
evidence.changedCase: Language, urgent content, resource availability, IDs, input, viewport, and retry all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tool suite and snapshots substitute for task execution.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each test to complete stakeholder process and invariant.

interactions.title: Defend public-health transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain original decisions, rejected carryovers, content authority, privacy, mechanisms, complete tasks, failures, changed evidence, repairs, tradeoffs, limitations, unresolved risks, and next work without publication claims.

evidence.observable: Defense demonstrates far transfer through brief-specific selection and evidence, not renamed mutual-aid structure or memorized feature inventory.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder rejects one chosen feature and introduces a new critical failure condition.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Different content proves a different project.
interactions.correctionRoute: Show how brief-specific tasks changed architecture, evidence, and tradeoffs.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A multi-defect review separates brief, architecture, source, behavior, evidence, and defense failures in an allegedly complete unfamiliar service.
activityDesigns.startingState: Four unseen project submissions look complete but contain different transfer failures hidden behind passing inventories and scores.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner diagnoses first divergence, repairs the causal boundary, and proves transfer with a new brief mutation.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback exposes only the first divergent task or evidence observation after diagnosis.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints name the next brief, artifact, consumer, or evidence layer, never a replacement design.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Checklist patches fail until the causal transfer gap and changed brief case pass.

interactions.title: Predict integrated invariant fallout
interactions.learnerAction: Predict complete-document, navigation-fragment, article-section, form-recovery, table-context, and changed-case consequences when a near-copy project changes content but not relationships or task architecture.

evidence.observable: Prediction identifies which copied assumption fails each new task, relationship, state, or changed case and why inventory still passes.
evidence.changedCase: The new brief reverses page ownership, form purpose, and table axes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Feature-complete template adapts through text replacement.
interactions.correctionRoute: Re-derive every relationship from new complete tasks.

interactions.title: Inspect false transfer evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect starter similarity, commit sequence, brief decisions, source, complete tasks, failures, changes, tool output, accessibility evidence, revisions, and defense claims to distinguish construction from copied completion.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis identifies exact missing selection, integration, adaptation, evidence, or defense competence without inferring intent from style alone.
evidence.changedCase: A second artifact has different code shape but the same unsupported task assumptions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original-looking source proves independent authorship and transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Evaluate decisions and behavior under unfamiliar changed constraints.

interactions.title: Repair multi-defect project causes
interactions.learnerAction: Repair brief misread, page and relationship architecture, overcollection, incomplete recovery, false table context, broken failure handling, shallow tests, and overclaimed defense in dependency order without bulk replacement.

evidence.observable: Each revision follows first divergent stakeholder evidence, preserves correct work, changes predicted complete-task behavior, and survives a fresh constraint.
evidence.changedCase: Privacy, target audience, content volume, and one failure process change after repair.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adding missing required elements repairs transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair decision boundary, then rebuild dependent artifact and evidence.

interactions.title: Explain defensible transfer correction
interactions.learnerAction: Explain brief evidence, first divergence, copied or unexamined assumption, root decision cause, affected invariants, minimal revision, complete-process retest, changed brief proof, limitations, and remaining risk.
interactions.artifactChange: Transfer clinic causal defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Explanation demonstrates selection and adaptation under unfamiliar constraints rather than completion, code volume, stylistic novelty, or checker success.
evidence.changedCase: A third brief produces the same surface failure from a different assumption.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing revised project proves transferable mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify transfer claim with another unfamiliar constraint.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independent community-support information and intake service is built from empty files and defended with complete content, behavior, accessibility, privacy, failure, validation, and changed-case evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unfamiliar fictional brief, content source packet, privacy rules, complete tasks, acceptance boundaries, and empty directory are provided without page list, skeleton, starter, or solution.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner independently interprets, builds, tests, revises, and defends an original service ready for external review but not publication.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports pass/fail task evidence and competency only.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No procedural hints appear before a failed submission; later hints identify only a brief or evidence boundary.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to a reduced prerequisite task and a different project resubmission segment.

interactions.title: Build community-support decision record
interactions.learnerAction: Interpret users, complete tasks, source authority, content ownership, unknowns, contradictions, privacy, safety, failure, page, relationship, evidence, scope, and tradeoff boundaries before opening files.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent project decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Every high-impact decision is brief-grounded, assumption-labeled, risk-aware, falsifiable, and connected to complete-task acceptance evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder changes one audience, privacy limit, task priority, and content owner.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Implementation can reveal requirements safely.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve or bound decisions before dependent construction.

interactions.title: Build original community-support service
interactions.learnerAction: From empty files build complete documents, truthful portable navigation and fragments, meaningful articles and sections, minimized intake and full recovery, and genuine comparison table context required by the brief.

evidence.observable: Every page and complete find, understand, compare, request, correct, submit, confirm, and return task works from original semantic source.
evidence.changedCase: Page ownership, information grouping, requested data, and comparison dimensions all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Including all course mechanisms proves mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Select only task-required truthful mechanisms and relationships.

interactions.title: Test complete project processes
interactions.learnerAction: Test source, DOM, validation, accessibility, navigation, network, console, form, request, side effects, table, keyboard, zoom, responsive, privacy, persistence, failure, retry, reset, and recovery across every page.

evidence.observable: Every acceptance claim has reproducible behavior, consumer, task, environment, limitation, and near-miss evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Resources fail, IDs change, input varies, text triples, viewport narrows, and retry occurs.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Demo walkthrough and green tools prove complete process.
interactions.correctionRoute: Exercise all actions, states, failures, and continuation paths.

interactions.title: Run adversarial project mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Mutate language, direction, content length and absence, quantity, order, pages, resources, identifiers, relationships, form purpose, input, state, table axes, keyboard, zoom, viewport, storage, network, failure, retry, and recovery.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent adversarial transfer evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Named stakeholder invariants survive simultaneous realistic variation or yield exact causal failures and bounded repairs.
evidence.changedCase: Every content, architecture, relationship, input, state, resource, and environment dimension changes together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One edge case per element establishes robustness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Partition mutations by complete task and causal invariant.

interactions.title: Revise project from evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Rank findings by task impact, privacy and safety risk, reach, dependency, and evidence confidence; repair first causes minimally; rerun complete processes and adversarial cases; preserve unresolved findings.

evidence.observable: Each revision connects stakeholder consequence to first divergence, cause, rejected patch, repair, retest, collateral check, limit, owner, and risk.
evidence.changedCase: A high-scoring artifact fails one critical keyboard and privacy task.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Fix count or severity label determines revision order.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prioritize complete-task consequences and causal dependencies.

interactions.title: Defend independent HTML mastery
interactions.learnerAction: Defend brief interpretation, original architecture, source authority, content relationships, element choices, navigation, data minimization, recovery, table context, failures, changed cases, revisions, tradeoffs, limits, risks, ownership, and next work.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent HTML mastery defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Defense demonstrates unfamiliar-task selection, integration, adaptation, causal revision, and bounded evidence without template, inventory, accessible, compliant, complete, or published overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: An external reviewer changes priority, audience, failure expectation, and evidence demand.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Finished artifact and presentation establish mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each mastery claim to unfamiliar decision and changed evidence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Delayed retrieval reconstructs the full HTML service system and transfer standard without prior notes, templates, or source.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen short briefs and evidence fragments appear without previous artifacts.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner retrieves, predicts, corrects, and explains every prerequisite and independent-transfer competency.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reveals the first evidence mismatch after commitment.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Retrieval is unaided first; correction then reveals one principle and a fresh brief.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss triggers explanation, parallel correction, and later reassessment.

interactions.title: Retrieve complete documents
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve doctype, mode, root language, head encoding, unique title, viewport, metadata, body, source, DOM, and independent page-consumer evidence from an empty unseen file.

evidence.observable: Complete authored page remains correct after title, language, metadata, and body changes.
evidence.changedCase: A page is copied into a new purpose and its metadata changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser scaffold is sufficient.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild serialized document truth.

interactions.title: Retrieve link and fragment tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve purpose, URL resolution, activation, destination, fragment target, hierarchy, visibility, focus, history, copy, and keyboard continuation for unseen local and public links.

evidence.observable: Every activation reaches exact current meaningful destination and continuation after changed paths and headings.
evidence.changedCase: Directory changes, heading ID changes, and a same-page link becomes cross-page.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid href and click success prove navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace URL and complete arrival task.

interactions.title: Retrieve article and section boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve independent distributable article, thematic section with heading, generic grouping, region, hierarchy, nested ownership, and changed-content evidence for unseen information cards.

evidence.observable: Grouping follows content independence and theme rather than visual box or required-element inventory.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable update becomes local context and a section loses its theme.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every card is article and every wrapper is section.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify content relationship and ownership.

interactions.title: Retrieve full form recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve minimized purpose, labels, groups, input meaning, inclusive validation, multi-error relationships, retained values, correction, request, side effects, confirmation, and retry evidence.

evidence.observable: Every diverse valid and invalid task corrects and submits once without lost unrelated data.
evidence.changedCase: Server errors arrive after interruption and one required field becomes optional.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Client validation and alert prove recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace complete input-to-success process.

interactions.title: Retrieve every-cell context
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve genuine table purpose, structure, necessary spans, simple or explicit header associations, every-cell context, copy, linearization, zoom, and local scroll evidence.

evidence.observable: Every value retains exact intended actual headers under changed groups, IDs, order, and viewport.
evidence.changedCase: Rows and columns regroup, spans change, and an identifier duplicates.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual grid and valid th syntax prove context.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive context from data axes and references.

interactions.title: Retrieve changed-case design
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve invariant, partition, mutation, expected behavior, first divergence, near-miss, failure meaning, repair boundary, regression value, and evidence limit for unseen HTML tasks.

evidence.observable: Mutation changes realistic condition without changing objective and detects a plausible shallow solution.
evidence.changedCase: The supplied example passes while translated, missing-resource, and retry cases fail.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Random edge cases or many fixtures prove coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive mutation from causal task invariant.

interactions.title: Predict transfer versus template completion
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which brief-specific architecture, mechanism, privacy, failure, evidence, revision, and tradeoff decisions distinguish independent transfer from a renamed near-copy project.

evidence.observable: Prediction identifies unfamiliar constraints that require new selection and a changed case that falsifies copied assumptions.
evidence.changedCase: Form purpose, page ownership, table axes, and privacy boundary all reverse.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Different code or content proves transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Evaluate decisions under unfamiliar task relationships.

interactions.title: Correct checklist-driven architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Replace required-element distribution with brief-derived users, complete tasks, content ownership, pages, relationships, data purpose, privacy, failures, acceptance evidence, and explicit scope.

evidence.observable: Every mechanism is necessary for this task and rejected alternatives are recorded with changed evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder removes one feature and changes the primary task.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All course features should appear in capstone.
interactions.correctionRoute: Select only from brief and relationship evidence.

interactions.title: Correct evidence-free completion claim
interactions.learnerAction: Replace finished-file, screenshot, validator, accessibility score, and demo claims with complete-process behavior, failure, changed-case, environment, limitation, revision, and remaining-risk evidence.

evidence.observable: Conclusion is proportional, reproducible, task-specific, changed-tested, and explicit about independent review and pilot gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Green tools accompany a failed privacy, keyboard, and retry process.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More reports convert completion into proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every claim to capable task evidence.

interactions.title: Correct weak project defense
interactions.learnerAction: Replace tag inventory and aesthetic walkthrough with brief decisions, alternatives, causal relationships, complete tasks, privacy, failures, changed evidence, revisions, tradeoffs, limits, risks, owners, and next work.

evidence.observable: Defense proves reasoning and adaptation under unfamiliar constraints rather than confidence, code volume, or presentation polish.
evidence.changedCase: Reviewer challenges one element, relationship, test, and unsupported conclusion.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Confident detailed presentation is defensible evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Answer each challenge with task mechanism and bounded evidence.

interactions.title: Explain cumulative HTML transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how documents, navigation, content relationships, form recovery, table context, changed tests, unfamiliar selection, integration, revision, and bounded defense demonstrate HTML mastery without claiming publication.

evidence.observable: Every mastery claim traces unfamiliar brief decision through original artifact, complete task, changed evidence, correction, limit, and later transfer need.
evidence.changedCase: Brief, relationships, privacy, failure, content, and environment all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Capstone completion is self-validating mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify mastery with a new unfamiliar constraint.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A secure defense measures independent brief interpretation, complete original HTML construction, prerequisite integration, changed evidence, causal revision, and bounded professional defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen housing-navigation, public-event, cooperative-service, and local-resource briefs use empty files and original evidence fixtures.
activityDesigns.completionState: Server-side grading records transfer evidence without hints, canonical answers, or template source.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Scoring records observable evidence per competency after submission.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No assessment hints, page skeletons, required tag lists, or canonical answers are exposed.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure records gaps and later routes to worked correction and a materially different brief.

interactions.title: Build unseen complete pages and navigation
interactions.learnerAction: From empty files build complete uniquely titled language-aware pages, meaningful portable links, exact destinations, fragments, target context, focus, history, copy, and keyboard continuation for an unseen brief.

evidence.observable: Every page and navigation task remains correct after directory, page, title, language, heading, and fragment changes.
evidence.changedCase: One page splits, project root moves, labels translate, and target IDs change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Working current links prove independent navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record document-navigation transfer gap.

interactions.title: Structure unseen service content
interactions.learnerAction: Select and code hierarchy, landmarks, navigation lists, prose, independent articles, thematic sections, generic groups, contact ownership, figures, media, disclosure, and source order from unseen content relationships.

evidence.observable: Each structure follows content independence, theme, ownership, hierarchy, and complete task rather than visual cards or inventory.
evidence.changedCase: Content ownership, reuse, hierarchy, and quantity change after construction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One learned page pattern fits any service.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record content-relationship transfer gap.

interactions.title: Repair unseen form recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Debug purpose overcollection, labels, group context, input meaning, constraints, multi-error relationships, retained values, summary, focus, correction, request, duplicate effects, confirmation, retry, and privacy.

evidence.observable: Diverse complete valid and invalid tasks collect only needed data, recover fully, and submit exactly once.
evidence.changedCase: Purpose narrows, server adds errors, one field becomes optional, and retry follows interruption.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Native validation and success notice prove intake.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record recovery-transfer gap.

interactions.title: Repair unseen comparison table
interactions.learnerAction: Decide whether unseen data is genuinely tabular, then debug caption, groups, spans, th and td roles, scopes, IDs, headers, every-cell context, copy, linearization, zoom, and local scrolling.

evidence.observable: Every changed value retains exact intended actual headers and complete comparison task context.
evidence.changedCase: Axes swap, groups split, columns reorder, spans change, and an ID duplicates.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Grid appearance and valid syntax prove comparison.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record table-transfer gap.

interactions.title: Design unseen transfer mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Derive changed language, content, quantity, order, resources, IDs, relationships, form purpose, input, state, table axes, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, retry, reset, and recovery tests from stakeholder invariants.

evidence.observable: Every mutation targets a causal invariant, preserves objective, rejects a shallow near-miss, and predicts exact failure and repair boundary.
evidence.changedCase: The supplied happy path remains fixed while every realistic dimension changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Edge-case volume proves transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record changed-case transfer gap.

interactions.title: Interpret unseen stakeholder brief
interactions.learnerAction: Identify users, complete tasks, content authority, ownership, unknowns, contradictions, assumptions, privacy, safety, failures, pages, relationships, evidence, scope, tradeoffs, questions, and acceptance boundaries before proposing markup.

evidence.observable: Decisions are brief-grounded, assumption-labeled, risk-aware, falsifiable, and materially specific to the unseen service.
evidence.changedCase: Audience, privacy limit, content owner, task priority, and failure expectation all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Experienced developer can infer the intended site directly.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record brief-interpretation transfer gap.

interactions.title: Revise unseen project from evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose first divergent brief, source, consumer, behavior, accessibility, privacy, failure, validation, or changed-case evidence; repair minimally; reject surface patches; rerun complete processes and collateral checks.

evidence.observable: Revision traces stakeholder consequence to root decision or implementation cause, changed behavior, preserved correctness, limitations, and residual risk.
evidence.changedCase: Green tool output accompanies a failed privacy, keyboard, retry, and comparison task.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Fixing listed defects demonstrates revision skill.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record causal-revision transfer gap.

interactions.title: Defend independent HTML transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Defend brief decisions, original architecture, source authority, content relationships, mechanisms, navigation, privacy, recovery, table context, failures, changed cases, revisions, tradeoffs, limits, risks, ownership, and next work under reviewer challenges.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent HTML transfer defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Defense proves unfamiliar-task selection, integration, adaptation, causal revision, and bounded evidence without template, inventory, style, code-volume, accessible, compliant, complete, or published overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: Reviewer changes audience, primary task, privacy rule, failure boundary, and evidence expectation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Finished artifact and confident presentation establish mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record independent-transfer defense gaps.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, stakeholder, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, privacy, assistive-technology, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing briefs, original source packets, empty project workspaces, deterministic service fixtures, authoritative receivers and side-effect ledgers, canonical answers, executable checks, browser and assistive-technology evidence, reviewer protocol, observed-user tasks, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
